title: Map Overlay Story
description: Overlay-heavy fixture for resources, cities, mountains, rivers, and faction color markers.

states.label: Ridge
states.headline: Map Overlay | ridge and river preview
legendLines: Home city + enemy city: faction markers
summaryLines: This state stresses home-city badges against ridge and river edges.
It should make overlay density readable without hiding the terrain stage.

states.label: Resource
states.headline: Map Overlay | resource emphasis
legendLines: Resource nodes: wood / stone / iron / grain
Different terrain families should keep their silhouette
Use this to judge icon density at mid zoom
summaryLines: The resource state is where overlay clutter shows up first.
Every node should still feel owned by the map, not pasted on top of it.

states.label: Homefront
states.headline: Map Overlay | homefront ownership
legendLines: Home city badges must survive denser zoom
Enemy control should remain obvious without extra chrome
summaryLines: Use the homefront state to judge faction color and badge clarity.
This is the first pass before province and nation overlays are added.
